dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses mean reversion strategy. Entry conditions translated: price_pos_20 represents deviation from 20-period moving average (0=below, 1=above). Values <0.06 or >0.94 represent >1.5 std dev deviations (approximated via price position quantiles). Volume confirmation uses vol_ratio_20 (volume vs 20-period average). Exit targets the sma_20 (mean reversion target). Stop loss set to 1.0 std dev via stop_loss_pct. Hold time capped at 5 bars. No news event detection available in allowed indicators, so entry on extreme deviation alone. Context-dependent direction since signal expects both long and short entries depending on deviation direction.

source_rule_text: Markets exhibit systematic price corrections following investor overreaction or underreaction to news; traders should exploit mean reversion by trading against initial price movements that deviate from fundamental value, expecting systematic price movements back toward fair value.
